prs.title: fix: remove SMS validation of fields for Twilio Verify
fix: cannot create nor edit foreign keys from schema visualiser
updated method to use click review
fix: cron integration form
chore: Bump vulnerable dependencies
chore: update InviteUserModal to use rhf
fix(Docs): Apply retry strategy, improve error throwing
fix: use entitlement check for project pausing
feat: Enable Github on free plan under a feature flag
Chore/minor qol improvements to queue operations
fix(studio): show queue changes label for queued table edits
Connect iteration - review fixes
error rates in functions list (review fixes)
fix: keep recent items labels in sync after renames
fix(studio): keep editor browser titles in sync after renames
Fixed dinner time
fix: minor sentry issues
fix: copy cell for record peak portal on forgien relationship
chore: Revert "Update GH integration in project settings (#44008)"
fix(auth): scope permissions and org list cache keys by user ID FE-2872
fix: annoying and confusing bugs with queue operations in table editor
feat(billing): show billing address modal to users other than owners/admins
fix: webhook regression
chore(billing): make update billing address modal non-dismissable
feat(studio): add app id and installation id to private apps metadata
docs: Update nextjs user management guide to use getClaims
Couple of minor UI nudges in edge functions UI
fix(billing): clarify service restriction reset delay after billing cycle
ci: fix mgmt api docs generator
Fix/build issue react flow
Added Dash pages, fixed formatting on other pages
fix: upgrade button not shown on Stripe Sync Engine integration page
fix(studio): SSOConfig field widths
Revert "blog: Supabase joins the Stripe Projects developer preview"
updating migration guide
fix(studio): resolve outstanding Sentry issues
fix: case insensitive comparison for non-json message
fix(studio): smol design bug on connect dialog mode selector
chore: refactor queue operations with write operations into a single hook
chore: refactor auth provider form to use react-hook-form
Fix mcp url
fix: flatten AI generation schema for filters
fix(mgmt-api): update types
fix(Docs): Remove raw GitHub endpoint calls and move ot Octokit. Create common util for GitHub files.
docs: update js sdk docs (2.100.0)
docs: Update SvelteKit User management tutorial with correct auth methods
feat: update @supabase/*-js libraries to v2.100.0
Fix missing edge when deploying a new RR, and add some small qol tidbits
fix: 404 pricing
feat: add docs button for custom auth providers
Add cancel action in save queue action bar
Use TimestampInfo in edge functions created at column + use relative label
Joshen/fe 2852 edge functions editor clips horizontal overflow on resize
error rates in functions list
Fix Data API docs: least-privilege grants, RLS wording, broken redirect and nav link
chore(studio): reuse key-value field array for params
[bot] Decrease ESLint ratchet baselines
fix: remove client router filter
Studio SQL export emits valid PostgreSQL literals
Gildasgarcia/fe 2426 show relationship line context and highlight on hover
feat(studio): make filter bar ui its own row
Reinstate source param in new connect sheet to select read replicas
Add copy button to function header in function details page
chore: bump stripe-experiment-sync to version 1.0.29
Update GH integration in project settings
error rates in functions list
Updated webinar pages with YouTube recording links
chore: remove filter feature flag
fix(observability): use 30m step for 7-day dashboard to preserve spikes FE-2813
Reviewing 401 guide
fix(Docs): Add cache-control and default to HTML content
fix: updated to show functions count
Chore improve e2e tests
feat: button to enable custom providers
chore: add test for undo feature for queue operations
feat(assistant): track chat IDs in PostHog events
blog: Supabase joins the Stripe Projects developer preview
feat(assistant): per-endpoint reasoningEffort + model config cleanup
Use new sheet component + small nudges to UI
fix(Docs): Expose errors on dynamically fetch content under database …
Hide is unique option for column that's a primary key
chore(studio): temporarily disable default secure sql
feat(logs): show edge function name in logs FE-2798
replace deprecated "Linking.useURL" with "useLinkingURL"
fix(Docs): Broken graphql page and missing navigation
Refactor queue operations to not mutate the query client to simplify implementation
chore(docs): add Colum Ferry to humans.txt
fix(Docs): Improve await error handling on external content sources.
Simplify SaveQueueActionBar positioning logic to just CSS
Add support for cmd z undo in table editor for queue operations
Chore/shift manual queries into pg meta 04
www: redesign customer stories, blog layout, and footer
Chore/shift manual queries into pg meta 03
adds env step to shadcn
chore(studio): share key-value field array editor
Revert "fix: Disable`/incident-banner` query"

feat(assistant): upgrade AI SDK v5 → v6
refactor: move /incident-banner to app router
feat: add shortcuts for copy markdown, json or download CSV

Add source filter in query performance page
